desc.en: Huai'an Tram was officially opened on 28 December, 2015. As the only rail transit system in the city, the Huai'an Tram connects Huai'an District and Qingjiangpu District, serving as an important means of transportation for communication between the two districts and for tourists to travel throughout the city.
desc.zh-Hans: 淮安有轨电车于2015年12月28日正式开通运营。作为该市唯一的轨道交通系统，淮安有轨电车连接淮安区和清江浦区，是两区之间的重要交通工具，也是游客游览全市的重要交通方式。
